name: Auto-compile GPL on save
description: When a .gpl or .dat file is saved, runs MakeGPL.bat in the parent mod/quest folder to recompile the BCD

then.prompt: A GPL source file was edited. Run `cmd /c MakeGPL.bat` from the mod/quest folder containing this file to recompile the BCD. If MakeGPL.bat doesn't exist in that folder, copy one from IceSpell/MakeGPL.bat and update OUTPUTNAME and GPLPROJECTFILE variables to match, then run it.
